context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 complete. All features working: 1) Client creation bug fix verified - form uses <form onSubmit={preventDefault}>, save button type=submit, dialog closes, toast 'Cliente creato con successo' shows, page stays on /clients (no home redirect). 2) EBITDA page at /ebitda works - year selector, 4 KPI cards (kpi-revenue, kpi-costs, kpi-margin, kpi-incassato), charts (chart-ebitda, chart-margin), monthly table with 12 rows. 3) Settings tabs - Azienda, Banca, Logo (upload area), Condizioni (textarea) all present. 4) Sidebar shows 'Analisi Finanziaria' link to /ebitda.
